subject: [PATCH v2 00/14] userfaultfd: working set tracking for VM guest memory

2026-05-14.patch_summary: This patch series adds support for tracking the working set of VM guest memory using userfaultfd, allowing a VMM to identify cold pages and evict them to tiered or remote storage. The patches address various issues and feedback from reviewers, including decoupling protection none handling, renaming PTE bit macros and accessors, and preserving RWP markers during copy-on-fork operations. The series also includes self-tests for the new functionality.
